name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve LynxX
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 🌍 Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 125 |
| Node.js | e.g. v18.20.0 |
| Wallet | e.g. Freighter v5.x |
| Network | Testnet / Mainnet |

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, contract IDs, transaction hashes, etc.).
